entries.objective: Fix icons not displaying after build and install — codicon font files are excluded from the .vsix package because .vscodeignore has `node_modules/**`, which strips `@vscode/codicons` CSS and font files. Need to either: (a) copy codicon assets into the `out/` directory during build, or (b) whitelist the codicons path in .vscodeignore. The panel-provider.ts references `node_modules/@vscode/codicons/dist/` for localResourceRoots and codicon.css.
